Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: Running-trees fall too, but rarely hurt. Young ones are light as feather! Old ones are springy, land without damage. Ancient ones might crack but rarely move, so not at risk.

Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: Running-trees know this, invite guest anyway. Market at least could have been safe on ground!

Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: Ahh, but Gronk talk too much, lose track of purpose! Does human like treasure? Gronk give big discount for heavy item!

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: The Trork's assorted treasures are quite shiny and appealing, though unfortunately your assignment on Kweebdrasil did not include the provision of any gold or commodities for barter.

Choices.Text: Sorry, I don't have anything to pay with.
